name: repo-forensics
description: Audit untrusted repos before they touch your agent. Fully local, zero dependencies, zero telemetry.

interface.shortDescription: Security scanner for AI agent plugins, skills, and MCP servers.
interface.longDescription: Audit any repo, skill, MCP server, or plugin before installation. 20 scanners detect supply chain attacks, prompt injection, credential theft, and runtime exploitation. Zero dependencies, fully offline, nothing uploaded.
defaultPrompt: Run repo-forensics on this project and show me the security findings.
Scan this repo for supply chain attacks and prompt injection.
Audit this MCP server before I install it.
